sections.paragraph:
to swell up, hence used of the unshod foot, to become callous. Deu 8:4 Neh 9:21. Well rendered by the LXX. in Deut. ἐτυλώθησαν. [Hence the two following]-

בצק

m. dough, so called from its swelling up, although used of the lump also before it is leavened, Exo 12:34, 39 Exo 12:39 2Sa 13:8 Jer 7:18.
